scope_note: Goal Kicker currently exports GPA-policy notes for this school. Where the school does not publish a hard GPA cutoff or admitted-student GPA distribution, the panel says that directly instead of inventing a threshold.
policy_summary: Michigan does not publish a minimum GPA in the source used here, but its official Common Data Set marks both academic record and academic GPA as very important in first-year admission decisions.

what_mit_does_say.claim: Michigan does not publish a minimum GPA in the source used here, but its official Common Data Set marks both academic record and academic GPA as very important in first-year admission decisions.
